methodology.classification_unit: each exact current BGP prefix is classified without splitting or aggregation
methodology.consistency_check: the first and last address of every original BGP prefix must resolve to the same mainland-China province; all other results remain unresolved
methodology.effect_on_admission: none; this output is for manual validation and does not alter the formal IPv6 lists
methodology.input: current admitted BGP prefixes from data/ipv6/operators
